verdict_reasoning: FZD10 is a 7-transmembrane GPCR (Class F frizzled family) with an extracellular N-terminal domain and multiple extracellular loops. It is a canonical Wnt signaling receptor that binds extracellular Wnt ligands and is constitutively cell-surface localized. CD350 designation confirms surface accessibility. The multi-pass TM topology provides its own membrane anchor.
